head: dense_fg_aux
hypothesis: P5: temporal_stride=3 probe. Wider still — ~0.50s temporal window at 30fps. Together with stride=2, this pair answers whether temporal context width matters and whether the effect is monotonic or has a sweet spot. Single variable vs E-45 (stride=1). Success: stronger signal than stride=2 (if temporal context is the bottleneck). No-go: pf_mIoU drops >0.01 (temporal gap too wide — frames decorrelate), any size bin drops >0.03.
